# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.022 — Contents of Petition

(a) A petition submitted under Section 315.021 (Establishment of Lighting Improvements) (a)(2) must:

    (1) state that a street or a district composed of streets, highways, or alleys should be lighted;

    (2) state that lighting improvements are needed for that purpose;

    (3) name and describe the street or district to be lighted;

    (4) state that the lighting will be a public improvement and will be conducive to the public welfare; and

    (5) be signed by a majority of the owners of property abutting streets designated in the petition.

(b) A petition submitted under Section 315.021 (Establishment of Lighting Improvements) (a)(2) may:

    (1) provide plans and specifications for the requested lighting improvements; and

    (2) specify the kind of poles, lights, or other material necessary to properly install the improvements or any part of the necessary material.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A petition submitted under Section 315.021 (Establishment of Lighting Improvements) (a)(2) must:
state that a street or a district composed of streets, highways, or alleys should be lighted;
state that lighting improvements are needed for that purpose;
name and describe the street or district to be lighted;
state that the lighting will be a public improvement and will be conducive to the public welfare; and
be signed by a majority of the owners of property abutting streets designated in the petition.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A petition submitted under Section 315.021 (Establishment of Lighting Improvements) (a)(2) may:
provide plans and specifications for the requested lighting improvements; and
specify the kind of poles, lights, or other material necessary to properly install the improvements or any part of the necessary material.
